en: The word of the LORD came to me:
zh: 耶和華的話臨到我說：

en: "And you, O son of man, thus says the Lord GOD to the land of Israel: An end! The end has come upon the four corners of the land.
zh: “人子啊！主耶和華對以色列地這樣說： ‘終局到了！終局臨到這地的四境了！

en: Now the end is upon you, and I will send my anger upon you; I will judge you according to your ways, and I will punish you for all your abominations.
zh: 現在終局已經臨到你了。 我要發怒攻擊你， 按著你的行為審判你，照著你一切可憎的事報應你。

en: And my eye will not spare you, nor will I have pity, but I will punish you for your ways, while your abominations are in your midst. Then you will know that I am the LORD.
zh: 我的眼必不顧惜你，我也不憐恤你， 我卻要按著你的行為，照著你中間可憎的事報應你， 你們就知道我是耶和華。’

en: "Thus says the Lord GOD: Disaster after disaster! Behold, it comes.
zh: 主耶和華這樣說： ‘看哪，災禍，獨特的災禍，臨到了！

en: An end has come; the end has come; it has awakened against you. Behold, it comes.
zh: 終局到了，終局臨到了，它已經起來跟你作對。 看哪，它臨到了！

en: Your doom has come to you, O inhabitant of the land. The time has come; the day is near, a day of tumult, and not of joyful shouting on the mountains.
zh: 這地的居民哪，災害臨到你了！ 時候到了，日子近了， 是混亂喧嚷的日子，不是山上歡呼的日子。

en: Now I will soon pour out my wrath upon you, and spend my anger against you, and judge you according to your ways, and I will punish you for all your abominations.
zh: 現在我快要把我的烈怒倒在你身上， 向你完全發盡我的怒氣。 我要按著你的行為審判你， 照著你一切可憎的事報應你。

en: And my eye will not spare, nor will I have pity. I will punish you according to your ways, while your abominations are in your midst. Then you will know that I am the LORD, who strikes.
zh: 我的眼必不顧惜，我也不憐恤。我卻要按著你的行為， 照著你中間可憎的事報應你， 你們就知道擊打你們的是我耶和華。

en: "Behold, the day! Behold, it comes! Your doom has come; the rod has blossomed; pride has budded.
zh: “‘看哪，這日子到了！ 災害已經發出， 杖已經開花， 狂傲已經發芽。

en: Violence has grown up into a rod of wickedness. None of them shall remain, nor their abundance, nor their wealth; neither shall there be preeminence among them.
zh: 強暴興起，成了懲罰邪惡的杖， 他們無一存留，他們的群眾都不在了。 他們的財富沒有了，他們中間也沒有尊榮。

en: The time has come; the day has arrived. Let not the buyer rejoice, nor the seller mourn, for wrath is upon all their multitude.
zh: 時候到了，日子近了， 買的不必歡喜，賣的不用憂愁； 因為烈怒要臨到眾人身上。

en: For the seller shall not return to what he has sold, while they live. For the vision concerns all their multitude; it shall not turn back; and because of his iniquity, none can maintain his life.
zh: 賣的人雖然還活著， 卻不能得回所賣的。 因為這個關乎眾人的異象必不更改。 因為罪孽的緣故，沒有人能保全自己的性命。

en: "They have blown the trumpet and made everything ready, but none goes to battle, for my wrath is upon all their multitude.
zh: “‘他們吹了號角，準備了一切， 卻沒有人出去作戰； 因為我的烈怒要臨到眾人身上。

en: The sword is without; pestilence and famine are within. He who is in the field dies by the sword, and him who is in the city famine and pestilence devour.
zh: 城外有刀劍，城內有瘟疫和饑荒； 在田野的必死在刀下，在城裡的必被饑荒和瘟疫吞滅。

en: And if any survivors escape, they will be on the mountains, like doves of the valleys, all of them moaning, each one over his iniquity.
zh: 他們中間逃脫的，必因自己的罪孽在山上發出哀聲， 像谷中的鴿子哀鳴一樣。

en: All hands are feeble, and all knees turn to water.
zh: 他們的手都發軟，他們的膝像水一般軟弱。

en: They put on sackcloth, and horror covers them. Shame is on all faces, and baldness on all their heads.
zh: 他們必用麻布束腰，戰兢把他們遮蓋， 各人的臉上滿是羞愧，各人的頭上都光禿。

en: They cast their silver into the streets, and their gold is like an unclean thing. Their silver and gold are not able to deliver them in the day of the wrath of the LORD. They cannot satisfy their hunger or fill their stomachs with it. For it was the stumbling block of their iniquity.
zh: 他們要把自己的銀子拋在街上， 把自己的金子當作污穢之物。 在耶和華發怒的日子，他們的金銀不能拯救他們， 不能滿足他們的心，也不能填滿他們的肚腹， 因為這些金銀都成了叫他們落在罪孽裡的絆腳石。

en: His beautiful ornament they used for pride, and they made their abominable images and their detestable things of it. Therefore I make it an unclean thing to them.
zh: 他們以美麗的飾物為誇耀， 又用這些來鑄造可憎可厭的偶像， 因此我要使它們成為污穢之物。

en: And I will give it into the hands of foreigners for prey, and to the wicked of the earth for spoil, and they shall profane it.
zh: 我要把它們交在外族人的手裡作掠物， 給地上的惡人作戰利品，他們必褻瀆這些東西。

en: I will turn my face from them, and they shall profane my treasured place. Robbers shall enter and profane it.
zh: 我必轉臉不看他們，讓他們褻瀆我的聖所。 強盜要進那裡去，褻瀆那地方。

en: "Forge a chain! For the land is full of bloody crimes and the city is full of violence.
zh: 你要製造鎖鍊， 因為這地滿了血腥 ，這城滿了強暴。

en: I will bring the worst of the nations to take possession of their houses. I will put an end to the pride of the strong, and their holy places shall be profaned.
zh: 我要使列國中最兇惡的人來佔領他們的房屋； 我要止息強盛者的驕傲，他們的聖所都被褻瀆。

en: When anguish comes, they will seek peace, but there shall be none.
zh: 驚恐臨到，他們就求平安，卻得不著。

en: Disaster comes upon disaster; rumor follows rumor. They seek a vision from the prophet, while the law perishes from the priest and counsel from the elders.
zh: 災禍加上災禍，壞消息加上壞消息，不絕而來， 他們要向先知求異象， 但是，祭司的教訓、長老的指導，都必斷絕，

en: The king mourns, the prince is wrapped in despair, and the hands of the people of the land are paralyzed by terror. According to their way I will do to them, and according to their judgments I will judge them, and they shall know that I am the LORD."
zh: 君王要悲哀，官長要把淒涼當作衣服穿上， 那地人民的手都要發顫。 我要按著他們的行為待他們，按著他們審判的法則審判他們，他們就知道我是耶和華。’”
